scripts.build: dotenv -e ../web/.env -- bun build --compile --minify-whitespace --minify-syntax --target bun --outfile server --external @tanstack/react-start --external @tanstack/start-server-core --external winston --external winston-transport ./src/index.ts
scripts.container-start: (command -v podman-compose > /dev/null 2>&1 && podman-compose -f ../web/docker-compose.yml down && podman-compose -f ../web/docker-compose.yml up -d) || (docker-compose -f ../web/docker-compose.yml down && docker-compose -f ../web/docker-compose.yml up -d)
scripts.dev: bun run container-start && dotenv -e ../web/.env -- bun run --watch src/index.ts
